ads.author: Rayand Candy Lewis
ads.title: Williams Gorgar Pinball Machine
ads.description: Vintage Williams Gorgar pinball machine has a fantasy horror theme with red, black, and white cabinet art. This solid-state machine is the first talking pinball game and has a four-player digital display. The playfield has three pop bumpers, two flippers, and a magnet feature. The backglass has vibrant multi-colored artwork depicting a demon figure. It needs service.

ads.author: Ian Brockman
ads.title: RAIDEN II UPRIGHT VERTICAL SHOOTER ACTION ARCADE GAME
ads.description: RAIDEN II Upright Vertical Shooter Action Arcade Game Take command of one of the most celebrated vertical scrolling shooters ever made with this Raiden II Upright Arcade Machine. Originally released in 1993 by Seibu Kaihatsu, Raiden II became a fan favorite thanks to its fast-paced gameplay, stunning graphics, explosive sound effects, and challenging action. (Wikipedia) This dedicated upright cabinet delivers the authentic arcade experience, featuring intense air-to-ground combat, powerful weapon upgrades, massive boss battles, and support for one or two players. Whether you’re a longtime arcade collector or a shoot-’em-up enthusiast, Raiden II is a must-have addition to any game room.

ads.author: Ian Brockman
ads.title: Original Vintage 1981 Bally Midway Ms. Pac-man Arcade Machine All Original
ads.description: Original Vintage 1981 Bally Midway Ms. Pac-Man Arcade Machine – All Original Own a true piece of arcade history with this original 1981 Bally Midway Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine. This is an authentic, dedicated cabinet featuring its original artwork, cabinet, and classic design that made Ms. Pac-Man one of the most iconic arcade games ever produced. The machine retains its vintage character and has not been converted or reproduced. It is a great addition for collectors, game rooms, arcades, or anyone looking to own an original Golden Age arcade machine.

ads.title: X Arcade Tank Stick
ads.description: X Arcade tank stick Bought a year ago and never got around to using it. Here's some info I got from the x arcade website. See below. X-ARCADE TANKSTICKTM FEATURES The Industrial-Grade 3TM Trackball located in the center of your TankstickTM separates this controller from the Dual Joystick and allows you to control thousands of classic arcade games. Since it's recognized as a standard mouse--you can also enhance any of your favorite games that support a mouse, with no drivers or software required. X-ARCADE TANKSTICKTM INDESTRUCTIBLE BENEFITS 100% Compatible With Any Operating System 100% Compatible With All Windows Versions 100% Compatible With All Emulators and Front Ends Use On Your Mac 100% Compatible With MAMETM + Pinball Emulation 15 LBS Of Authentic Arcade Parts Ripped From A Real Arcade Machine Trackball Functions As A Standard 3 Button Mouse Double Left/Right Pinball Flipper Buttons Play Head To Head Fighting Games Like The Local Arcade. Withstand Thousands Of Hours Of Button Smashing Action.k Hardware-Programmable (Must Connect PS-2 Keyboard To X-Arcade) Only Game Console Games Supporting A Mouse Can Use Trackball Use With Android Devices, Raspberry PI and Ouya Dentists & Dr's: Great For Patient Waiting Rooms!

ads.author: Marcelo Santana
ads.title: POPEYE ARCADE MACHINE by NINTENDO 1982 - original cabinet.
ads.description: Taking offer & willing to trade 1982 Nintendo Popeye Arcade Machine Original Cabinet Fully Working Own a piece of arcade history with this original 1982 Nintendo Popeye Arcade Machine. This is the authentic original cabinet, making it a highly desirable collectible for arcade enthusiasts and vintage gaming collectors. Condition: * Fully functional works perfectly * Excellent overall condition * Coin mechanism works properly * Original cabinet * Includes original manuals and circuit board maps * No known issues This classic Nintendo arcade game features the iconic Popeye gameplay that made it a favorite in arcades during the early 1980s. Whether you’re adding to a game room, arcade collection, or looking for an investment-quality vintage machine, this is a great example. Feel free to message me with any questions or if you’d like additional photos or a video of it in operation.
